peerSet.selectionBasis: Template placeholder for an approved source-owner comparison set; replace with the actual source-owner selection basis.
caveats: Do not infer cannibalization, portfolio migration, or occasion substitution from this peer set.

Room-to-grow inputs do not prove causality or forecast growth.

Ahead/Behind cannot substitute for penetration headroom, share gap, or category growth.

caveats: Metric-level significance must come from the approved tracker source.
